case_title: DYLAN ALMEIDA VS. AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 02/22/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,448.00 FILED BY ALMEIDA, DYLAN AS TO DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES - 0-- SERVED JAN-14-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIR TRAVEL CENTER INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-22-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SUSAN GAGUI--MANAGER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
